use_cases: Displaying real-time statistics or metrics on dashboards with animated feedback
Showing vote counts, likes, or engagement metrics with smooth transitions
Interactive inventory or stock quantity controls in e-commerce interfaces
Progress steppers or count indicators in multi-step onboarding flows
Live analytics counters that update with satisfying spring-based animations
ai_summary: A dynamic animated counter component that smoothly transitions between numeric values using spring physics from Framer Motion. Features color-transforming backgrounds and text that shift based on the counter value, with subtle scale and rotation animations triggered on each increment or decrement. Includes proper negative number handling and digit-by-digit animation with padded formatting.
